programme.title: Dutch News
programme.desc: News via stream and file delivery from BVN-NOS Netherlands, in Dutch, no subtitles.

programme.title: Macedonian News
programme.desc: News via satellite from MRT in Skopje, North Macedonia, in Macedonian, no subtitles.

programme.title: Croatian News
programme.desc: News via satellite from Hrvatska Radiotelevizija (HRT) Croatia, in Croatian, no subtitles.

programme.title: Serbian News
programme.desc: News via satellite from Serbian Broadcasting Corporation, in Serbian, no subtitles.

programme.title: Bosnian News
programme.desc: News via satellite from BHRT Sarajevo Bosnia and Herzegovina, in Bosnian, no subtitles.

programme.title: Armenian News
programme.desc: News via satellite from Channel H1 Armenia (Yerevan), in Armenian, no subtitles.

programme.title: Portuguese News
programme.desc: News via satellite from RTP Lisbon, Portugal, in Portuguese, no subtitles.

programme.title: Maltese News
programme.desc: News from PBS Malta with the latest updates from the Maltese Islands and beyond. Streamed to SBS from Valletta, Malta, in Maltese, no subtitles.

programme.title: Gujarati News
programme.desc: News via satellite from DD News Ahmedabad India, in Gujarati no subtitles.

programme.title: Punjabi News
programme.desc: News via satellite from PTC Chandigarh, India, in Punjabi, no subtitles.

programme.title: Hindi News Aaj Tak
programme.desc: The Top 100 News Stories of India today from Aaj Tak, delivered via File, in Hindi, No Subtitles.

programme.title: Nepali News
programme.desc: News via satellite from Nepal Television Kathmandu, Nepal, in Nepali, no subtitles.

programme.title: Urdu News
programme.desc: News via satellite from PTV Islamabad, Pakistan, in Urdu, no subtitles.

programme.title: Korean News
programme.desc: News via satellite from YTN Seoul, Korea, in Korean, no subtitles.

programme.title: Insight
programme.desc: Few areas of medicine are more divided than care for transgender children and teens. And as medical pathways for trans minors in parts of Australia - and around the world - become restricted, Insight asks members of the trans community whether we have the balance right.

programme.title: Dateline
programme.desc: Dateline goes bull-riding at the world's longest running gay rodeo, where America's queer cowboys and queens are saddling up for a rough ride under Trump.

programme.title: Tamil News
programme.desc: News via satellite from PolimerTV Chennai India, in Tamil, no subtitles.

programme.title: Malayalam News
programme.desc: News via file delivery from Asianet News Thiruvananthapuram (Trivandrum), Kerala India, in Malayalam, no subtitles.

programme.title: Turkish News
programme.desc: Turkish language news from the Turkish Radio and Television Corporation (TRT) in Istanbul, Turkiye, no subtitles.

programme.title: NHK Japanese News
programme.desc: NHK's core news program wrapping up the days local and international events. News delivered via satellite from NHK Japan, in Japanese, no subtitles. Watch on SBS WorldWatch at 11pm everyday, also available on SBS OnDemand.

programme.title: Telugu News DD Yadagiri
programme.desc: News via satellite from DD Yadagiri, Hyderabad, Telangana, in Telugu, No subtitles. Broadcasting every night at 11:35pm on SBS WorldWatch Channel 35, also available daily on SBS OnDemand.

programme.title: Indonesian News
programme.desc: News via satellite from TVRI Jakarta, Indonesia, in Indonesian, no subtitles.

programme.title: France 24 English News
programme.desc: International news and current affairs from Paris, offering a French perspective on world events via satellite in English.

programme.title: Thai News
programme.desc: News via satellite from Thai Public Broadcasting Service, in Thai, no subtitles.

programme.title: Bangla News
programme.desc: News via satellite from Channel i Bangladesh, in Bangla, no subtitles.

programme.title: Sri Lankan Sinhala News
programme.desc: News from Sri Lanka Rupavahini Corporation Colombo, Sri Lanka, in Sinhala, no subtitles.

programme.title: Indonesian News
programme.desc: News via satellite from TVRI Jakarta, Indonesia, in Indonesian, no subtitles.

programme.title: Polish News
programme.desc: Wydarzenia from Polsat in Warsaw via satellite, in Polish, no subtitles.

programme.title: Italian News
programme.desc: News via satellite from RAI Rome in Italian, no subtitles.

programme.title: Filipino News
programme.desc: TV Patrol is the flagship national newscast of ABS-CBN and is currently the longest-running Filipino language evening newscast.

programme.title: French News
programme.desc: The 8pm news from France2 takes an in-depth look at the economic, environmental, political and societal issues of France and the world. In French, no subtitles, delivered via Satellite.Watch on SBS WorldWatch at 08:40am every day, also available on SBS OnDemand.

programme.title: Greek News
programme.desc: News via file transfer from ERT Athens Greece, in Greek, no subtitles.

programme.title: German News
programme.desc: The news of the day from Germany and the world. With reports and interviews from politics, society and culture. Provided by Zweites Deutsches Fernsehen (ZDF) in Mainz, Germany. Delivered via file transfer, in German, no subtitles.

programme.title: Spanish News
programme.desc: News via satellite from RTVE Madrid, Spain, in Spanish, no subtitles.

programme.title: Spanish News France 24
programme.desc: International news and current affairs from France24 studios in Bogota, offering a Latin American & French perspective on world events, in Spanish, no subtitles.

programme.title: Arabic News France 24
programme.desc: International news and current affairs from France 24 Arabic, via satellite, in Arabic, no subtitles.

programme.desc: News via stream and file delivery from BVN-NOS Netherlands, in Dutch, no subtitles.
